assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: Uses context.Caller directly in the if statement to check the token type.

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: For identity tokens, only emits a single Name claim and returns early.

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: For access tokens, builds a full claims list and uses context.AddRequestedClaims(claims) for scope filtering.
